site.title: Ben Davis | 6'9" Creator, Actor & Model in Philadelphia & NYC
site.description: Ben Davis is a 6'9" creator, actor and model based in Philadelphia and New York City. Lifestyle, fitness, fashion and fun. Available for collabs and bookings.

home.sub_rest: Too tall to fit in the closet. Lifestyle, fitness, fashion & fun.

modeling.title: Modeling
modeling.intro: A 6'9" frame that makes wardrobe, scale and presence impossible to ignore on camera. Editorial, fashion and product shoots, on location or in studio, for brands that want a look nobody else can give them.

acting.title: Acting
acting.intro: Hosting, skits, voice and on-set talent. Comfortable performing, improvising and carrying a scene with personality. A point of view nobody else has, six foot nine and impossible to miss.

content-creation.title: Content Creation
content-creation.intro: Sponsored content and integrations across Instagram, TikTok and YouTube, built to feel native to my audience and actually convert. 41K+ on Instagram and climbing, with a voice brands keep coming back to.

gallery.alt: Ben Davis TikTok profile, 6 foot 9 Icon

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm Ben, a 6'9" creator, actor and model living between Philadelphia and New York City. I make content about what life actually looks like at this height: the fits that finally fit, the workouts that keep tall bodies strong, and the everyday fun in between.
Lifestyle, fitness, fashion and fun, all from a point of view nobody else has. If you're a brand looking for someone who stands out in a crowd, literally, let's talk.

guide.title: Built Different
guide.body: A complete body care guide made specifically for tall people. Posture, strength, mobility and recovery, the exact system I use to move and feel good in a 6'9" body.

partner.text_rest: Skincare built with intention, not marketing. Use my code for 10% off the men's skincare I actually use.

contact.title: Let's collab
contact.intro: Brand deals, bookings, shoots or something new. Slide into the DMs or send an email and let's make it.
